name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Journey Ends
desc: Popatlal ensures that all his friends from Gokuldham receive a warm welcome at the resort. Jethalal reaches the owner's office for his meeting.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Fun Journey Continues
desc: Everyone continues to play a variety of games throughout their journey. The gents plan to set up a grand party for Popatlal to celebrate his success.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Prepares For Everyone's Arrival
desc: Everyone on the bus decides to take a small break before proceeding further. Jethalal plans to get done with his meeting quickly so he can prepare for everyone's arrival.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Games On The Bus
desc: The families have a blast on the bus, playing different games and teasing each other on their way to Rang Tarang Resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bus Ride To The Resort
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society board the bus and begin their journey to Rang Tarang resort. They decide to have all the fun and take necessary precautions as well.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Prepares To Leave
desc: Jethalal locks himself out of his room and has to wake up Bapuji to get in. Everyone from Gokuldham boards the bus to leave for the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Guest Of Honour
desc: Popatlal and his gang get a 5-star treatment at the resort. Meanwhile, everyone at Gokuldham prepares to leave for Rang Tarang resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Plans A Party
desc: Bagha puts Jethalal in the spotlight by asking him a hypothetical question. Everyone from Gokuldham calls Jethalal to show him the excitement for the celebration at the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Celebrating The Success
desc: The colony members are in a festive mood as they celebrate the success of Popatlal's secret mission. Bhide and his wife consider going to a resort along with everyone else to congratulate Popatlal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mission Kala Kauwa Completed
desc: With Madan's arrest, Popatlal's top-secret mission is completed successfully. Popatlal and Jethalal also extend the services of Gokuldham's members to the Rang Tarang resort's owner.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gathers Evidence
desc: Madan demands to be set free, as Popatlal does not have any proof against him. Popatlal manages to find a piece of video evidence that incriminates Madan.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Saved
desc: Inspector Pandey finds Popatlal, who tells them how he escaped death. Inspector Pandey's men also catch hold of Madan.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pandey Finds Clues
desc: Inspector Pandey suspects that there must be a secret at the pool since it is closed for everyone. To their surprise, they find more clues linked to Popatlal there.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pandey Maarega Dande
desc: Jethalal, Babuji, and Bagha celebrate when they see that Inspector Pandey has arrived from Mumbai. They share all the information about the goons that they have.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Meets The Boss
desc: Jethalal stumbles onto the boss of the operation and they find out that they are old acquaintances. Madan further tortures Popatlal who is still tied at the centre of the pool.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Police Arrives At The Resort
desc: Jethalal, Bagha and Bapuji are still on the run from the goons at the resort. Soon, Inspector Chalu Pandey arrives at the resort to investigate the situation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Waits For A Miracle
desc: Popatlal waits for a miracle as he is tied in the pool and will be electrocuted if he tries to move. Jethalal is running around the resort in a disguise trying to look for Popatlal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's New Cover
desc: The boss discovers about Jethalal, who is Popatlal's accomplice. Jethalal, Bagha, and Bapuji take a new disguise to escape from the clutches of the gang.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dulhe Ki Khatirdaari
desc: The boss continues to torture Popatlal while his assistant checks for more clues. Jethalal plans to go through the CCTV footage to look for Popatlal in the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets The Boss
desc: Jethalal bumps into Sanjana and deals with her discreetly. Popatlal finally comes face to face with the boss of the gang.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gets Caught
desc: After revealing his true identity to Sanjana, Popatlal gets caught by the gang. She calls Popatlal to meet him and sets him up to get captured.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Proposes To Sanjana
desc: Popatlal sets a romantic mood to propose Sanjana. Little does he know that she is involved in the dealing of the medicines.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets Sanjana
desc: Popatlal is sure that the receptionist has more allies in the resort. He devises a plan to make sure they can catch them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's New Suspect
desc: Popatlal and others keep their covers intact and steer clear from any suspicion. Jethalal also reveals the name of the person he thinks is the mole in the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Safed Kabootar
desc: The main boss comes up with a new code word and prepares for an important meeting. Meanwhile, Jethalal meets the manager and tries to extract information about all the employees.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Finding The Informant
desc: Popatlal realises that one of the waiters at the resort must be providing information to the main boss. Jethalal suggests that they should follow him to find more information about the gang.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Next Step
desc: Bagha drops the pen camera for Bharti so Popatlal can check what transpired at Jethalal's first meet. They meet again at the swimming pool to decide the next step for their mission.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Goes Undercover
desc: Popatlal explains what Jethalal will have to do to bring the mafia down. Jethalal puts on a disguise and tries to set up a meeting with the boss.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Finds About The Mission
desc: After Jethalal agrees to get on the boat with Popatlal, he gets reeled in about everything Popatlal has done for Mission Kala Kauwa. Will Jethalal accept the mission?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal At The Resort
desc: Jethalal inquires about the resort so he can confirm his order for the appliances in 200 rooms. Popatlal tells him to be patient till they manage to meet in person.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Secret
desc: Popatlal and Bharti get paranoid as they think that a waiter at the resort is onto their secret. Meanwhile, Jethalal enjoys a game of antakshari while on the way to the resort.

name: Jethalal Is On The Way
desc: Bhide calls Popatlal, hoping he could help him get an order for his pickles from the resort. Later, Jethalal calls Popatlal to give him an update.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Luring Jethalal
desc: Popatlal lures Jethalal to the resort so he can assist him with the Mission Kala Kauwa. Later, Dr Hathi calls Popatlal from his home to let him know that he is safe and sound.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Problems At Gada Electronics
desc: Bagha and Jethalal have to deal with surplus goods at their godown. Later, Popatlal calls Jethalal to give him a piece of good news.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Takes A Boat Ride
desc: Popatlal and Bharti check the pen camera that Dr Hathi left behind in the bathroom. They take a boat ride to clear their minds and come up with a new plan to revive "Mission Kala Kauwa".

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mission Kala Kauwa Failed
desc: Dr Hathi gets escorted out of the resort by one of the goons and he is not allowed to get in touch with Popatlal. Meanwhile, Bharti and Popatlal are kept busy and distracted by the resort's staff.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dr Hathi Fails
desc: Dr Hathi faces difficulty in getting the deal and fails to record the boss' face. Meanwhile, Popatlal gets distracted as his tour guide takes him sightseeing.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Chasing Dr Hathi
desc: Dr Hathi receives an important message and leaves to complete the mission. Meanwhile, Popatlal and Bharti have to overcome multiple hurdles to keep up with Dr Hathi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Finds Determination
desc: Popatlal and Bharti meet a waiter who is scared as her mother does not have the medicines she needs. This makes Popatlal more determined to uncover the people behind the medicine scam.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mission Hits A Speedbump
desc: Dr Hathi gets tired after eating too much at the resort. Meanwhile, Popatlal and Bharti get worried about the mission and try to get in touch with him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gets Distracted
desc: Popatlal and his team continue with their "Kala Kauwa" mission at the Rang Tarang Resort. However, Popatlal gets distracted when he finds an eligible life partner for himself.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mission Kala Kauwa
desc: Popatlal and Bharti explain the situation to Dr. Hathi and request his cooperation to discover the truth. Later, Dr. Hathi meets a probable suspect to extract information about their leader.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's New Mission
desc: Popatlal gets a call from one of his informants, who tells him that his life could be in danger. Popatlal immediately gathers his team and leaves for his new mission.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Prays For Health
desc: Mr. Mehta sits in his house reminiscing about the past year. He prays to God to keep everyone safe in the upcoming year as well.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Counsels The Students
desc: Taarak talks to Bhide and tries to give him an outsider's perspective. Soon, Bhide calms down and counsels the kids about the importance of education as he agrees to start the online classes immediately.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – All Parents Arrive At Gokuldham
desc: Jethalal fails to reason with Bhide and seeks help from Taarak Mehta regarding the same. Soon, all the parents arrive at Gokuldham Society to request Bhide to resume the online classes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Talks To All Parents
desc: Tapu Sena sees Bhide in a foul mood and tries to cheer him up. Later, Bhide informs the students and their parents that he is not going to teach them further.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Calls For A Parent Meeting
desc: Popatlal and Bhide take a scooter ride to the marriage bureau, where Bhide forgets his phone. Later, during his regular classes, Bhide gets angry and calls for a parent meeting with his students.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Worried About His Students
desc: Bhide teaches a new maths chapter and asks the kids to prepare as he will take a test later in the evening. Bhide leaves for delivery and meets Iyer and Popatlal on the way. He shares his worry about the future of his students with Popatlal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì The Troubled Bhide
desc: Bhide is troubled with his online classes, and Jethalal arrives at Bhide's house to talk about one of his students. The next day Bhide gets annoyed further by his friends in the Gokuldham Society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Taarak Mehta Ka Chhota Chasmah
desc: Jethalal thanks Bhide for saving his mobile by heroically catching it. Soon, Asit Bhai sends a link on everyone's mobile and asks them to play it to reveal his surprise for them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Waiting For Surprise
desc: When Babita asks about the stains on his clothes, Iyer tells her the entire incident. All of them return to their homes and tell their families about Asit Bhai's surprise.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Good News For Everyone
desc: Popatlal calls Jethalal, Taarak, Bhide, Sodhi, Iyer, Dr. Hathi to his place for a party. Later, Asit Bhai calls Taarak as he wants to give a piece of good news to everyone, but they will have to wait for it.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal - The Guru
desc: The members of the Gokuldham Society wait downstairs to celebrate with Popatlal. However, they get shocked to know that Pooja sees him as her Guru. Later, everyone asks Popatlal to stay hopeful and look at the bright side.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pooja Shares Her Feelings
desc: Pooja arrives at the Gokuldham Society, where she gets welcomed by Tapu Sena. Later, Pooja reveals a shocking fact to Popatlal that breaks his heart.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Preparation To Welcome Pooja
desc: The news that Pooja is coming to Gokuldham Society spreads quickly. Mahila Mandal decides to cook for Poaptlal and Pooja, while Tapu Sena prepares to welcome them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets Pooja
desc: Jethalal gets scolded by Bapuji for not remembering where he has kept his chequebook. Later, Popatlal finally gets to sit down with Pooja and have a conversation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Truth About The Parcel
desc: Popatlal finally finds the parcel he has been looking for and is happy about getting to meet Pooja. However, he never imagined the action Inspector Pandey will take for wasting the police's precious time.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Mangoes Found
desc: Inspector Pandey tries to find a middle ground between Popatlal and the delivery boy but fails to do so. Later, he manages to find the mangoes in someone's home. Who could this be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Seeks Pandey's Help
desc: Popatlal, tired of searching for his mangoes, resorts to Inspector Pandey's help. After questioning the delivery guy, he calls all members of the Gokuldham society to come out. Will Popatlal manage to meet Pooja with her gifts on time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gets Impatient
desc: Popatlal gets impatient with the search for his lost parcel. He visits Jethalal and Iyer's house to look for it. Later, Popatlal and Sodhi get in a fight with the delivery boy.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Search For Popatlal's Parcel
desc: Popatlal is in search of his wrong parcel that he is supposed to return. He visits every house in the Gokuldham Society to find clues for his missing mangoes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Lost Parcel
desc: Delivery boy comes with the right parcel and to collect the wrong one. However, Popatlal realises that he has lost the parcel that he was supposed to return.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Wrong Parcel
desc: Popatlal is excited and receives the gift that he had ordered for Pooja. After opening the parcel, he realises that he has received the wrong parcel.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Dream Girl
desc: Popatlal dreams of getting married to a girl whom he is going to meet soon. The next morning, Popatlal is excited and prepares to meet the girl of his dreams.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ki Fan
desc: Popatlal gets a call from a girl named Pooja who says that she is a big fan of him and wants to meet him. Popatlal figures out that the girl is single. What are his plans?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Infuriating Message
desc: Popatlal receives a message that makes him furious. He shares his anger and worries with Bapuji and Jethalal. Who sent the message?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The More The Merrier
desc: Babita invites Jethalal and his family to join them in celebrating her special day with Iyer. Later, Tapu makes everyone dance on this memorable day.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Delivers Gas Cylinder
desc: Jethalal manages to deliver the gas cylinder with the help of Doctor Hathi and Taarak Mehta. Later, Bapuji comes home and thinks that he has been robbed because of all the mess that Jethalal created.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gas Cylinder For Babita
desc: Jethalal comes back home to find a worried Babita standing outside. He asks her to not worry anymore as he is there to solve all her problems.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Babita's Special Dinner
desc: Babita is planning to cook a special dinner for Iyer. Suddenly, Jethalal starts getting calls from an unknown number. Who could it be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Maintenance Cheque
desc: Jethalal spends time with Babitaji on his balcony as Bapuji comes from behind and scolds Jethalal for wasting time. Later, Jethalal is stopped by Iyer and Popatlal who ask him for the society's maintenance cheque.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì The New Normal
desc: Jethalal goes back and checks on Tapu's online classes. Later, Taarak shares Bhide's worry with Anjali and talks about the new normal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì The Students' Future
desc: Bhide's students play antakshari during their online classes. Later, he complains about his students to other members of the Gokuldham Society. Everybody is tensed about the future of students as they have lost track of their studies due to lockdown.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide's Online Classes
desc: Bhide shares his online class issues with Taarak and Jethalal. He reveals the times have hindered the learning process for the children.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Discount On Tuition Fees
desc: At Bhide's house, the parents of the students arrive and ask him to give a discount on tuition fees. All members of the Gokuldham Society want to go to Abdul's soda shop. However, his shop is closed, so they gather at Taarak's house to have a chat.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Happy Days Are Back Again
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society are happy as they celebrate and dance together. Later, the ladies of Gokuldham gather near the vegetable stall and chat with each other.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The End Of Boghilal
desc: Everyone celebrates as Boghilal is taken to prison, and Jethalal's problems come to an end. Later, Jethalal manages to fulfill Iyer's order.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal And Boghilal's Final Showdown
desc: Boghilal threatens that he will make sure Jethalal will be put behind bars for harassment. However, Jethalal has an ace up his sleeve that will put him in the clear.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhogilal Calls The Police
desc: After finding out that the members of the Gokuldham Society were trying to set him up, Bhogilal plans to turn the tables and get them arrested.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhagwaan Bhogilal Ka Bhala Kare
desc: Bhogilal is still making excuses for not being able to transfer the money. Everyone else is trying to find ways to procure the money that he owes to Jethalal. Will they succeed?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Signs The Papers
desc: Though Bhogilal gets suspicious, he manages to trust Bapuji and gives him papers to sign. However, Bhogilal shows his true colours when Sundar asks him to make the payment.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Bhogilal Meets Bapuji
desc: Bhogilal is at Jethalal's house and questions Bapuji about his land and his son. Meanwhile, other members of the Gokuldham Society are hiding in different rooms.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhogilal Arrives
desc: Bhogilal arrives at Gokuldham Society. Taarak and Sundar keep him busy downstairs while everyone at Jethalal's house is hiding inside the rooms and kitchen.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Against Bhogilal
desc: The residents of the Gokuldham society gather at Jethalal's house and make a plan to trap Bhogilal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhogilal Is Sundar's Client
desc: After listening to Sundar talking to his client, everyone gets suspicious about his catchphrase. On questioning Sundar they find out that it is Bhogilal who wants to buy Jethalal's property for Rs. 1 crore. Everyone gets extremely angry and decides to set him up.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Dilemma
desc: Bapuji dreams of his father, where he is told that he is doing a good job by selling the property. However, Bapuji is also told to protect and keep the business running. Later, the client contacts Sundar and tells him that he is ready to pay Rs. 1 crore for Jethalal's ancestral property.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Jethalal Has Changed His Mind
desc: Jethalal wakes Bapuji in the middle of the night and informs him about the dream that he saw. Bapuji explains that it is not Dadaji who is denying to sell the land but his own guilt. Next day, Sundar and his friends arrive at Jethalal's house to leave for the meeting but Jethalal has changed his mind.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Grandfather's Warning
desc: Jethalal informs everyone about the good news that he has received from Sundar. Later, everyone goes back home and expresses their gratitude for being safe and healthy during these trying times. At night, Jethalal's grandfather visits him in his dream and gives him a warning.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sundar Brings Good News
desc: Jethalal reluctantly agrees to take Sundar's help for selling their ancestral property. Later, Sunder calls back to give them the good news that a party is ready to buy that property for Rs. 1 crore.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Bapuji Finds A Solution
desc: Bapuji and Tapu make dinner and sweets for Jethalal to lift his spirit. However, Jethalal does not respond to Bapuji and Tapu's surprise. Jethalal narrates his situation and talks about his decision to sell Gada Electronics. Bapuji tells Jethalal that they can sell their ancestral property and clear the debt.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Jethalal Sells His Shop
desc: Jethalal finds a party that is interested to buy his shop immediately. The next day, the man arrives to give the cheque for Gada Electronics, but Bagha doesn't hand over the keys. Jethalal gets furious and wakes up to realize that it was just a dream.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Without Jethalal
desc: Everyone tries to come up with alternate business options for Jethalal. However, Jethalal has decided that it will be best if he sells his shop to clear his dues and go back to his hometown. Everyone feels that the Gokuldham Society won't be the same without Jethalal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Plans To Sell His Shop
desc: Bagha helps Jethalal come to his senses and go back home. On reaching home, he finds that everyone is gathered at his house and Babitaji has told Bapuji the truth. Later, Jethalal reveals his plans to come out of this slump.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Apologizes
desc: Jethalal feels guilty about not being able to fulfill Iyer's order. He visits Iyer's office, to tell the truth, and apologize to everyone. Later, he seems depressed as sits down to wonder, how to save his company.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal In Deep Trouble
desc: Bhogilal reveals that the financial situation of his company has taken a massive hit during these trying times. He apologizes to Jethalal and Bagha for mistreating them and not being able to make the payment. Later, Sodhi and Bhide offer to take money from them to make the order for the tabs but Jethalal denies it.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Jethalal Meets Bhogilal
desc: Sodhi and Bhide arrive at Bhogilal's office and act as clients to set up the trap. Finally, Jethalal comes and they all threaten Bhogilal to give them the money. However, Bhogilal informs them he is in a poor financial situation due to which he won't be able to give the money.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi Poses As Crorepati
desc: Bhide and Sodhi get ready and meet Sodhi's friends, who will go as their bodyguards. They meet with Jethalal to discuss their plan again. Soon, everyone leaves to visit Bhogilal's office to get Jethalal's money back.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide And Sodhi's Plan
desc: Bhide and Sodhi prepare their plan to visit Bhogilal's place. Sodhi calls his friends as their bodyguard for protection. Later, Jethalal also receives a call from Iyer asking for his delivery. Will Jethalal deliver the order in time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Jethalal Seeks More Help
desc: Jethalal and Mehta Sahab decide a plot where Bhide and Sodhi will become clients of Bhogilal's hotel so that they can catch him and ask for Jethalal's payment. Later, Jethalal calls Bhide and Sodhi to his shop and explains everything.
